headlines.title: Kentucky governor urges McConnell to be ‘transparent’ and give an update on his health
headlines.description: Kentucky Gov. Andy Beshear is asking Mitch McConnell for an update on his health and whether he believes he can continue to serve in the role.

headlines.title: Trump holds bilateral meeting with Zelenskyy at NATO summit
headlines.description: During the NATO summit in Turkey, President Trump held a bilateral meeting with Ukrainian President Zelenskyy as he discussed efforts to end the conflict with Russia.

headlines.title: Sanders, Warren Drop Endorsements of Maine's Graham Platner
headlines.description: Maine’s Democratic senate nominee Graham Platner is facing mounting pressure from top Democrats to end his campaign, including from Elizabeth Warren and Bernie Sanders who have released statements calling for him to step aside. It comes amid new nonconsensual sexual conduct allegations which he denies. NBC’s Ryan Nobles reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: Platner faces growing calls to drop out after rape allegation
headlines.description: Maine Democratic Senate nominee Graham Platner is facing growing calls to drop out of the race after he was accused of rape. He denies the allegation. NBC News’ Ryan Nobles reports.

headlines.title: State Assemblyman Alex Bores speaks on AI and politics
headlines.description: State Assemblyman Alex Bores, a candidate for New York's 12th Congressional District, speaks with NBC News’ Gadi Schwartz about why some top artificial intelligence companies are opposing his candidacy and whether AI should play a role in politics.

headlines.title: Tracking the DOJ's effort to get U.S. voter registration data
headlines.description: The Justice Department is seeking voter registration list data from all 50 states and the District of Columbia over the past year.

headlines.title: DOJ warns of criminal charges for state election officials if noncitizens vote
headlines.description: President Donald Trump and his administration have falsely claimed that noncitizen voting is a widespread problem plaguing U.S. elections.

headlines.title: Senate sets new date for Jay Clayton’s confirmation hearing after Trump derailed the previous one
headlines.description: Clayton’s June 17 hearing for director of national intelligence was postponed at the last minute after President Donald Trump intervened.

headlines.title: Graham Platner considering ‘best path forward’ in Maine Senate race after denying sexual assault claim
headlines.description: Jenny Racicot, who once dated Platner, said he showed up at her home in 2021 and forced himself on her. Platner said the allegation is “categorically false.”

headlines.title: Trump says he asked FIFA to review U.S. soccer star Folarin Balogun’s suspension
headlines.description: The striker’s red card prompted fury from American soccer fans and concerns about the team’s prospects without its star player.

headlines.title: Interior secretary says administration will use the same company to repair Reflecting Pool
headlines.description: The administration has faced scrutiny for awarding a multimillion-dollar, no-bid contract to a company that previously worked on Trump properties.

headlines.title: Mallory McMorrow ends bid for Democratic Senate nomination in Michigan
headlines.description: The state senator’s decision sets up a two-person primary between former public health official Abdul El-Sayed and Rep. Haley Stevens.
